# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds1-create-program.spec.ts >> DS-1 Create Program (Didaxis Studio) >> TC-016 - Rapid double-click on Create does not create duplicate programs
- Location: tests/ds1-create-program.spec.ts:291:7

# Error details

```
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed

Locator:  getByRole('row').filter({ has: getByRole('button', { name: 'Edit I.G. DoubleClick 05/Jun/2026 [03:55:55]' }) })
Expected: 1
Received: 2
Timeout:  5000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for getByRole('row').filter({ has: getByRole('button', { name: 'Edit I.G. DoubleClick 05/Jun/2026 [03:55:55]' }) })
    14 × locator resolved to 2 elements
       - unexpected value "2"

```

```yaml
        - paragraph [ref=e588]: Select a program to manage semesters
```

# Test source

```ts
  215 |     const programName = `I.G. Renée's "Accelerated" Program ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  216 | 
  217 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  218 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  219 |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  220 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. special chars');
  221 |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  222 | 
  223 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  224 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  225 |   });
  226 | 
  227 |   test('TC-013 - HTML-like text in Program Name is rendered as plain text (no XSS)', async ({ page }) => {
  228 |     const programName = `I.G. <img src=x onerror=alert(1)> ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  229 | 
  230 |     // Fail loudly if the page tries to fire a native alert/confirm/prompt.
  231 |     const nativeDialogs: Dialog[] = [];
  232 |     page.on('dialog', (d) => {
  233 |       nativeDialogs.push(d);
  234 |       void d.dismiss();
  235 |     });
  236 | 
  237 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  238 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  239 |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  240 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. xss');
  241 |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  242 | 
  243 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  244 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  245 |     expect(nativeDialogs).toHaveLength(0);
  246 |   });
  247 | 
  248 |   test('TC-014 - Creating a second program with an existing name is rejected (DS-3 AC3)', async ({ page }) => {
  249 |     const programName = `I.G. Duplicate Name ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  250 | 
  251 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  252 | 
  253 |     // Step 1: create the original row.
  254 |     const firstModal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  255 |     await firstModal.fillProgramName(programName);
  256 |     await firstModal.fillDescription('I.G. first');
  257 |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, firstModal);
  258 |     await expect(firstModal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  259 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  260 | 
  261 |     // Step 2: attempt to create a second program with the exact same name.
  262 |     const secondModal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  263 |     await secondModal.fillProgramName(programName);
  264 |     await secondModal.fillDescription('I.G. second');
  265 |     await secondModal.clickCreate();
  266 | 
  267 |     // Modal stays open with entered values preserved.
  268 |     await expect(secondModal.dialog).toBeVisible();
  269 |     await expect(secondModal.programNameInput).toHaveValue(programName);
  270 |     await expect(secondModal.descriptionInput).toHaveValue('I.G. second');
  271 | 
  272 |     // Exactly one row with that name remains in the list.
  273 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  274 |   });
  275 | 
  276 |   test('TC-015 - Very long Description is accepted', async ({ page }) => {
  277 |     const programName = `I.G. Long Desc ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  278 |     const longDescription = 'I.G. description '.repeat(60).slice(0, 1000);
  279 |     expect(longDescription).toHaveLength(1000);
  280 | 
  281 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  282 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  283 |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  284 |     await modal.fillDescription(longDescription);
  285 |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  286 | 
  287 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  288 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  289 |   });
  290 | 
  291 |   test('TC-016 - Rapid double-click on Create does not create duplicate programs', async ({ page }) => {
  292 |     const programName = `I.G. DoubleClick ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  293 | 
  294 |     // Slow the create endpoint so the user can "race" two clicks against it.
  295 |     await page.route('**/api/programs', async (route) => {
  296 |       if (route.request().method() === 'POST') {
  297 |         await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
  298 |       }
  299 |       await route.continue();
  300 |     });
  301 | 
  302 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  303 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  304 |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  305 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. double click guard');
  306 | 
  307 |     const idPromise = waitForProgramCreate(page);
  308 |     await Promise.all([
  309 |       modal.createButton.click(),
  310 |       modal.createButton.click({ force: true }).catch(() => {}),
  311 |     ]);
  312 |     await idPromise;
  313 | 
  314 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
> 315 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
      |                                             ^ Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
  316 |   });
  317 | 
  318 |   test('TC-017 - Closing the modal with Esc while typing discards input', async ({ page }) => {
  319 |     const draftName = `I.G. EscDiscard ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  320 | 
  321 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  322 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  323 |     await modal.fillProgramName(draftName);
  324 |     await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
  325 | 
  326 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  327 |     await expect(programs.row(draftName)).toHaveCount(0);
  328 | 
  329 |     // Re-opening must show empty fields (no draft retention).
  330 |     const reopened = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  331 |     await expect(reopened.programNameInput).toHaveValue('');
  332 |     await expect(reopened.descriptionInput).toHaveValue('');
  333 |   });
  334 | });
  335 | 
```
